sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82797" key="petropoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πετρο-ποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n82797.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">producing stones</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δύναμις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:3:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
